description: A legacy inventory application at '/home/ga/legacy-migration/' fails to start because it relies on hardcoded internal DNS hostnames: 'db.inventory.local', 'cache.inventory.local', and 'auth.provider.external'. Configure network aliases in 'docker-compose.yml' for the postgres, redis, and mock-auth services to enable hostname resolution. The source code is immutable; the fix must be implemented via infrastructure configuration. The task is complete when the 'legacy-app' container runs successfully and logs 'All systems go!'.
